summary: Tested Geo-fencing, Event Cancellation, MyTickets Watch button, and Mobile Calendar features for ShowMeLive.online. 15/16 backend tests passed (1 minor test issue with PUT geo-settings list params). All frontend features verified working correctly.

minor.issue: List parameters (allowed_countries, blocked_countries) need to be passed as multiple query params with same name, not as JSON array. This is a FastAPI query param behavior, not a bug.

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/events returns events with geo-fencing fields (geo_restricted, allowed_countries, blocked_countries)
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: true' for unrestricted events
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: true' for allowed countries (US, CA)
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: false' for blocked countries (RU)
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/check-geo returns 'allowed: false' for countries not in allowed list
Backend: GET /api/events/{event_id}/geo-settings requires authentication (401)
Backend: GET /api/events/{event_id}/geo-settings returns 403 for non-creator
Backend: GET /api/events/{event_id}/geo-settings returns geo settings for creator
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/cancel requires authentication (401)
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/cancel returns 403 for non-creator
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/cancel successfully cancels event
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/cancel refunds all tickets and returns count
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/cancel returns 'already cancelled' for cancelled events
Backend: POST /api/events/{event_id}/cancel returns 404 for non-existent event
Backend: GET /api/admin/events returns creator info and revenue breakdown
Backend: GET /api/tickets/{ticket_id}/calendar requires authentication
Frontend: Homepage loads correctly with events carousel
Frontend: CreateEvent page has Geo-Fencing toggle and country selection UI
Frontend: Creator Dashboard shows Cancel Event button for upcoming events
Frontend: MyTickets page shows 'View Event' button for upcoming events
Frontend: MyTickets page shows 'Add to Calendar' button with download icon
Frontend: MyTickets calendar download works on mobile (fetch+blob method)
Frontend: Cancelled events show 'CANCELLED' badge
Frontend: Refunded tickets show 'REFUNDED' overlay and refund reason
Frontend: Refunded tickets have strikethrough on amount paid
critical_code_review_comments: PUT /api/events/{event_id}/geo-settings uses query params for lists - consider using request body for better API design
All new features are properly implemented and working
seed_data_creation: Created test users, events, and tickets for testing. All cleaned up after tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Geo-fencing uses ISO 2-letter country codes (US, CA, GB, etc). Event cancellation automatically refunds all ticket holders and sends notifications. MyTickets uses fetch+blob for calendar download which works on mobile. Admin events endpoint returns creator info, ticket counts, platform fees (20%), and creator earnings (80%).

features: Allowed Countries selection (US, CA, UK, etc.)

event_cancellation.ui_location: /creator/dashboard - Cancel Event button on event cards
features: Automatic refund of all ticket holders
View Event button for upcoming events
Watch Now button for live events (with pulse animation)

mobile_calendar_download.implementation: Uses fetch API with blob download instead of anchor tag
features: Includes event title, date, time, venue, description
